title: 8 Herbal Teas For Anxiety
description: Zingiber officinale teas contains compounds like gingerol and shogaol, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce stress and anxiety. The antioxidant properties of these compounds help protect the body from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to feelings of anxiety.
